blockers.description: Dev server running from main repo, not worktree. API route /api/enrich returns 404 because the route file only exists in the worktree.
blockers.workaround: Continue UAT from main worktree after merging, or start dev server from worktree directory

decisions.decision: maxOutputTokens (not maxTokens) for AI SDK v6
decisions.rationale: Parameter renamed in v6, caught during execution

decisions.decision: Topics stored as JSON string in SQLite
decisions.rationale: SQLite has no native array type; Prisma bug #26571 prevents @default on JSON columns
Vercel cron jobs invoke via GET by default

next_action: Merge gsd/phase-02-ai-enrichment into main, start dev server, resume UAT with /gsd:verify-work 2
context_notes: Phase 2 execution complete (2/2 plans, 4/4 tasks, verification passed 9/9). UAT in progress: test 1 passed (unit tests), tests 2-3 recorded as issues (404 due to worktree/dev-server mismatch), tests 4-5 pending. User wants to continue from main worktree instead.
